headline: ₹200-500 Cr at risk (capex deployment phase) — Adani Power's $3B Bihar plant signals routine capex, moderate ESG and financial impact
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], CDP, GRI, TCFD triggered; disclosure required but no penalty unless non-compliant.
No immediate P/E impact; future cash flows depend on plant ramp-up and utilization.
Possible minor increase in cost of capital (+20-40bps) if disclosure lags; otherwise, neutral.
